name: dependency-graph
description: Analizador estático de Python y Typescript que genera un grafo interactivo de dependencias entre archivos, clases y funciones.

scripts.package-bin: cd ../lsp-backend && cargo build --release && mkdir -p ../lsp-client/bin/$(node -e "process.stdout.write(process.platform + '-' + process.arch)") && cp target/release/lsp-backend ../lsp-client/bin/$(node -e "process.stdout.write(process.platform + '-' + process.arch)")/lsp-backend
